title: euphrasia wettsteiniana
intro: Euphrasia wettsteiniana, also known as the Austrian eye-clover or alpine eye-bright, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a vasodilator and anti-inflammatory, making it useful in treating conditions such as conjunctivitis and hemorrhoids. The health benefits of Euphrasia wettsteiniana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve vision, and support eye health, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Euphrasia wettsteiniana, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
